input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.3.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.3.5
            TITLE: shoes

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.5: Shoes
VE.3.3.5 Shoes  
Shoes or boots made from Flame Resistant Material that meet an approved standard and 
labeled as such: 
• SFI Spec 3.3 
• FIA Standard 8856-2000  
• FIA Standard 8856-2018

final_answer: rule VE.3.3.5: Shoes or boots made from Flame Resistant Material that meet an approved standard and labeled as such: • SFI Spec 3.3 • FIA Standard 8856-2000 • FIA Standard 8856-2018
